title: MEWA Sahabah Water Sector Entrepreneurship Accelerator
sponsor_institution: Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture (MEWA)
description_short: MEWA's Sahabah accelerator supports water-sector startups and SMEs through mentorship, resources, and access to Ministry networks to advance sustainable water entrepreneurship in the Kingdom.

title: Inspire-U Innovation Grant Program (up to SAR 100,000)
description_short: InspireU by STC Group provides non-refundable seed grants of up to SAR 100,000 for Saudi digital innovators and entrepreneurs to develop and pilot ICT solutions, accessible via the CODE/MCIT Innovation Lab portal.

title: National Infrastructure Fund (NIF) – Project Financing
sponsor_institution: National Infrastructure Fund (NIF) / National Development Fund (NDF)
description_short: The National Infrastructure Fund provides long-term financing to Saudi and international investors for large-scale infrastructure projects aligned with Vision 2030 including roads, utilities, and logistics.

title: Ministry of Transport – PPP Investment Opportunities
sponsor_institution: Ministry of Transport and Logistic Services (MOT)
description_short: Saudi Arabia's Ministry of Transport offers public-private partnership investment opportunities across roads, rail, aviation, and maritime sectors as part of the National Transport and Logistics Strategy.

title: Arab Culture Fund (AFAC) – Cultural Grants up to USD 50,000
sponsor_institution: Arab Fund for Arts and Culture (AFAC)
description_short: AFAC offers annual grants up to USD 50,000 for Arab artists, filmmakers, writers, and cultural organizations including those based in Saudi Arabia to fund creative and cultural projects.

title: Gulf Investment Corporation (GIC) – GCC Private Equity & Infrastructure
description_short: GIC, owned by the six GCC governments including Saudi Arabia, invests in private equity, infrastructure, and fixed income across the Gulf with a mandate to support regional economic development.

title: Masdar Clean Energy Investment Platform
description_short: Masdar partners with governments and developers to co-invest in renewable energy projects across the region; Saudi entities can apply to co-develop solar, wind, and clean energy assets.

title: KAUST Integrative Activities – Research Translation Fund (up to USD 1M)
sponsor_institution: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
description_short: KAUST's Integrative Activities program offers research translation grants up to USD 1M for collaborative projects that bridge academic research and commercial applications in science and technology.

title: National Development Fund (NDF) – Infrastructure Financing
description_short: The National Development Fund coordinates financing of industrial and infrastructure projects in Saudi Arabia through its subsidiary funds to accelerate Vision 2030 economic diversification goals.

title: National Center for Privatization (NCP) – PPP Investor Portal
description_short: Saudi Arabia's NCP Investor Portal lists USD 213B in privatization and PPP opportunities across healthcare, education, utilities, transport, and municipalities open to local and international investors.

title: Wa'ed Ventures – Aramco Venture Capital Program
description_short: Wa'ed Ventures, backed by Saudi Aramco, provides equity investment up to USD 10M in innovative Saudi startups and technology companies that contribute to economic diversification and the energy sector.

title: Industrial Sector Support Initiative (ISSI) – Ministry of Industry
sponsor_institution: Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources (MIM)
description_short: Saudi Arabia's Ministry of Industry Industrial Sector Support Initiative offers financial incentives, land access, and operational support for new and expanding manufacturing facilities in the Kingdom.

title: Ma'aden – Mining Exploration & Investment Partnerships
description_short: Ma'aden invites global mining companies and investors to partner in exploration and development of Saudi Arabia's vast mineral resources including gold, phosphate, bauxite, and industrial minerals.

title: Future Minerals Forum – Mining Investor Matchmaking Program
sponsor_institution: Future Minerals Forum (Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources)
description_short: The annual Future Minerals Forum in Riyadh runs a formal matchmaking program connecting mining investors with Saudi and global mineral project developers and government stakeholders.

title: NTDP Relocate Initiative – Up to SAR 5M (USD 1.4M) Support for Tech HQ Relocation
description_short: NTDP's Relocate initiative offers international technology companies up to SAR 5.2M (~USD 1.4M) in incentives to establish their regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia and grow their local footprint.

title: NTDP TechCrew – Salary Subsidy Program for Tech Talent
description_short: NTDP TechCrew subsidizes salaries for Saudi nationals hired in technology roles at qualifying companies, drawing from a SAR 300M fund to support growth of the local tech workforce.

title: NTDP VentureDebt – Debt Financing for Tech Startups
description_short: NTDP VentureDebt provides non-dilutive debt financing through a SAR 600M+ fund for Saudi technology startups that need growth capital without giving up equity.

title: Social Development Bank – IT Sector Financing
description_short: The Social Development Bank (SDB) of Saudi Arabia offers dedicated financing solutions for Saudi SMEs and startups in the information technology sector including digital infrastructure and software businesses.

title: CODE Innovation Labs – Digital Entrepreneurship Incubation Network
description_short: CODE's Innovation Labs network spans Saudi Arabia providing co-working space, mentorship, seed funding access, and government connections to early-stage digital entrepreneurs and tech startups.

title: Saudi Water Authority (SWA) – Water Sector Investment Programs
description_short: SWA runs multiple investment and privatization programs for Saudi Arabia's water and wastewater sector open to public and private investors including desalination, treatment, and distribution projects.
